title: MissBarbare'sPalette
description: A mod aiming to bring plenty of varied and colorful blocks
body:
MissBarbare's Palette is a mod aiming to bring plenty of varied and colorful blocks
The goal had plenty of blocks that come from all around the world. 
Here's what added in the mods

### New Wood Blocks:
- Cactus wood , a new woodtype crafted from vanilla cactus
- Wood shingles , new wood blocks with slab and stairs included for all wood types
- Wooden bars and grates crafted from sticks and coming in all the wood types.
-(Wood shingles , bars and grates are also available in all of Nature's Spirit Wood Type if you have the mod installed)

### New Stones Blocks:
- Black Quartz coming with all the blocks you can expect from vanilla quartz.
- Checker Block , the perfect block to create a kitchen floor
- Cut Stone Blocks coming with stairs and slab
- Dirty Stone Blocks , the same as the cut stone but you can put plant on top.
- Granite Bricks coming with stairs , slab and wall
- Diorite Bricks , same as the Granite Bricks
- Andesite Bricks , same as the Diorite Bricks
- Mossy Bricks for Granite , Diorite , Andesite , Deepslate , Tuff , Mud and regular bricks
- Sculk Bricks also coming with stairs , slab and wall
- Terracotta Shingles coming with stairs , slab in all the terracotta colors
  
### Every other blocks added
- Honeycomb bricks coming in blocks , stairs , slab and walls
- Polished Honeycomb Block coming in blocks ,stairs , slab , wall , pressure plate and button
- Deep Lamps , a light block crafted from iron and glow ink that can be dyed
- Coral Bricks , coming in all kind of coral and can be waxed
- Waxed Coral Block (they don't die outside of water)
- Turtles Tiles , crafted with turtle scute and stone come with stairs , slab and walls
- Blaze Bricks , coming with stairs , slab , wall and fences
- Smooth Blaze Blocks , Blaze Bricks inside of a furnace become Smooth Blaze Blocks and can be crafted into stairs and slab.
- Breeze Bricks , work the same as the Blaze Bricks
- Smooth Breeze Blocks , also work the same as Blaze Bricks
- Cut Iron Block , you can now craft iron block into cut iron block with stairs and slab
- Iron Grate , work the same as the Copper Grate
- Dripweave , a block crafted from Dripleaf block they come in stairs , slab and wall and you can place vegetation including small dripleaves on top
- Big Flower Bush , you can now craft big flower bush from roses , sunflowers , lilac and peony.
-Copper Strip a light block that can be rotated inspired by officials mojang concept arts

And more coming in the future.
